productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Checks Blue Flip Flops
description: The Checks flip flop from adidas features geometrical, almost psychedelic patterns on its footbed for the fans of the Pop Art era. Pait it with your favourite T-shirt and washed denims. Upper Textured rubber straps in a thong style, with rubber toe separator and adidas 3-Stripes PU footbed for cushioned comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with geametrical lugs for maximum traction flip flops care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
